newKeys.description: Primary download button label in the AI model download screen. {modelName} is the model's display name or 'Select a model' placeholder.
Confirmation dialog title when accepting a merch reward. {displayName} is the reward's display name.

newKeys.value: You'll forfeit the {displayName} (level {level}). This can't be undone.
newKeys.description: Confirmation dialog body when cancelling a merch reward. {displayName} is the reward name; {level} is the level it was unlocked at.

newKeys.value: On-device AI models run intensive computations on your phone. This may increase battery drain and cause the device to warm up during workout generation. Larger models use more resources.
newKeys.description: Warning text shown about battery and thermal impact of on-device AI models.
Cancel button label in the AI model download screen.
Button label to delete a downloaded model and free storage. {size} is a formatted storage size like '1.2 GB'.
Progress label while downloading an AI model. {percent} is 0-100.
Label for the RAM row in device compatibility section.

newKeys.value: Required to download models from HuggingFace. Get your free token at huggingface.co/settings/tokens
newKeys.description: Helper text below the HuggingFace token input field.
Chip label showing minimum RAM required for a model. {ramLabel} is a formatted size like '4 GB'.
Placeholder text in the download button when no model is selected.
Chip label showing storage required for a model. {size} is a formatted size like '2.0 GB'.
Section title in Beast Mode screen for the algorithm inspector feature group.

newKeys.value: See the math behind your workouts
newKeys.description: Subtitle under the Algorithm Inspector section title in Beast Mode.
Section title in Beast Mode screen for recovery and progression feature group.

newKeys.value: Visualize your body's recovery and forecast growth
newKeys.description: Subtitle under the Recovery & Progression section title in Beast Mode.
Section title in Beast Mode screen for the customization lab feature group.
Subtitle under the Customization Lab section title in Beast Mode.
Section title in Beast Mode screen for the workout algorithm feature group.
Subtitle under the Workout Algorithm section title in Beast Mode.
Section title in Beast Mode screen for data and sync tools feature group.

newKeys.value: Debug sync issues and manage your data
newKeys.description: Subtitle under the Data & Sync Tools section title in Beast Mode.
Section title in Beast Mode screen for the workout templates feature group.
Subtitle under the Workout Templates section title in Beast Mode.
Section title in Beast Mode screen for the about / build-info feature group.
Subtitle under the About Beast Mode section title.
Label shown on a challenge card when the current user issued the challenge.
Continue button at the bottom of the challenge complete dialog.
Snackbar shown when applying a new coach voice fails. {error} is the exception message.
Phase label shown on the cycle screen. {displayName} is the localized phase name e.g. 'Follicular'.
Training intensity suggestion shown under the cycle phase. {intensity} is e.g. 'Moderate'.

newKeys.value: Predictions are estimates based on your logged data, not a birth-control method and not medical advice. See a clinician for any health concern.
newKeys.description: Disclaimer text at the bottom of the cycle predictions section.
Retry button label on the cycle screen error state.

newKeys.value: Log your first period to start predictions.
newKeys.description: Empty state message shown when the user has not yet logged any period data.
Sheet title / header when the picker is in 'favorite' mode.
Sheet title / header when the picker is in 'staple' mode.
Sheet title / header when the picker is in 'queue' mode.
Sheet title / header when the picker is in 'avoided' mode.

newKeys.value: Search for exercises to add to your favorites
newKeys.description: Search hint text when the picker is in 'favorite' mode.

newKeys.value: Search for core lifts to lock in your workouts
newKeys.description: Search hint text when the picker is in 'staple' mode.

newKeys.value: Search for exercises to include in your next workout
newKeys.description: Search hint text when the picker is in 'queue' mode.

newKeys.value: Search for exercises you want to skip
newKeys.description: Search hint text when the picker is in 'avoided' mode.
Prefix text before a highlighted search term in the exercise picker results header. Trailing space is intentional.
Button label to create a custom exercise when no library match is found. {name} is the search query.
Counter chip label showing how many exercises are selected in multi-select mode. {n} is the count.
Save button label in the exercise picker when no multi-pick selection is pending.
Save button label in the exercise picker showing the count of items to save. {n} is the count.
Filter section header label for body part filters in the exercise picker.
Filter section header label for equipment filters in the exercise picker.
Filter section header label for exercise type filters in the exercise picker.

newKeys.value: {sessions, plural, one{Used 1 session ago} other{Used {sessions} sessions ago}}
newKeys.description: Row label in the freshness decay live preview showing how many sessions ago an exercise was performed.
Badge label on a merch claim card showing which level unlocked this reward. {level} is an integer.
Success snackbar shown after accepting a merch reward. {displayName} is the reward's display name.
Error snackbar shown when accepting a merch reward fails. {error} is the exception message.
Error snackbar shown when cancelling a merch reward fails. {error} is the exception message.

newKeys.value: Are you sure you want to delete "{exercise}"? This cannot be undone.
newKeys.description: Confirmation dialog body when deleting a custom exercise. {exercise} is the exercise name.
Sheet title showing the plan name being paused. {planName} is e.g. 'Zealova Premium'.
Info item title in the pause subscription sheet explaining billing stops.

newKeys.value: You won't be charged during the pause
newKeys.description: Info item subtitle in the pause subscription sheet explaining no charges during pause.
Info item title in the pause subscription sheet explaining data is kept.

newKeys.value: Your workout history & progress remain safe
newKeys.description: Info item subtitle in the pause subscription sheet explaining history is preserved.
Info item title in the pause subscription sheet explaining premium features are restricted.
Info item subtitle in the pause subscription sheet explaining premium feature restriction.
Primary action button label when a pause duration is selected. {duration} is the label e.g. '1 Month'.
Primary action button placeholder text when no pause duration is selected yet.
Section header in the Progression Pace settings screen for the speed control group.
Section header in the Progression Pace settings screen for the fine-tune control group.
Section header in the Progression Pace settings screen for the deload control group.
Snackbar shown when generating a shareable report image fails. {error} is the exception message.

newKeys.value: No {reportName} data for {month} yet — try a different month
newKeys.description: Snackbar shown when a report has no data for the selected month. {reportName} is the report title; {month} is e.g. 'Apr 2026'.

newKeys.value: Please select at least one workout day
newKeys.description: Inline validation error shown when the user tries to save zero workout days.
Success snackbar after saving updated workout days. {days} is a comma-separated list of day names.
Sheet title for the workout days selector sheet.

newKeys.value: Select which days you want to work out
newKeys.description: Subtitle below the sheet title in the workout days selector sheet.

newKeys.value: {n, plural, one{1 day selected} other{{n} days selected}}
newKeys.description: Counter label showing how many days are currently selected in the workout days selector sheet.

newKeys.value: Changing days will reschedule your upcoming workouts automatically.
newKeys.description: Info note in the workout days selector sheet warning about automatic rescheduling.
Save button label in the workout days selector sheet when changes have been made.
Disabled save button label in the workout days selector sheet when nothing has changed.
Overflow indicator label on a strain risk card when volume exceeds the weekly cap. {percent} is a formatted integer string.
Weekly change label on a strain risk card. {signedPercent} is a signed integer string e.g. '+12' or '-5'.
Chart title when a specific muscle group is selected in the volume chart. {muscleGroup} is e.g. 'Chest'.
Chart title when no specific muscle group is selected in the volume chart (all-muscle view).
Badge label on the volume chart showing the number of risky weeks. {count} is an integer.
Legend item label for the volume line/bar in the volume chart.
Legend item label for weeks marked as dangerously high volume increase in the volume chart.
Reference line label for the average volume in the volume chart.
Reference line label for the peak volume in the volume chart.
X-axis label in the volume chart.
Coming-soon feature bullet in the Wear OS settings section.
Coming-soon feature bullet in the Wear OS settings section.
Coming-soon feature bullet in the Wear OS settings section.
Coming-soon feature bullet in the Wear OS settings section.
Snackbar shown when deleting a workout history entry fails. {error} is the exception message.
Snackbar shown when a file import fails. {error} is the exception message.
Form validator message for the exercise name field in the manual history entry form.
Form validator message for required numeric fields (weight, reps, sets) in the manual history entry form.
Form validator message for invalid numeric values in the manual history entry form.

newKeys.value: Export from Hevy, Strong, Fitbod, Jeff Nippard, Renaissance Periodization, Wendler 5/3/1, Apple Health, Garmin, Strava, Peloton, and more.
newKeys.description: Helper text in the file import section listing supported source apps.
Confirmation dialog body when removing an exercise entry from workout history. {exerciseName} is the exercise name.
Summary tile label showing the data source and session count. {sourceDescription} is e.g. 'Hevy'; {count} is an integer.
Summary tile label showing the maximum weight lifted. {weight} is a formatted decimal string like '120.5'.
Compact level label in the XP progress card compact layout. {level} is the current level integer.
Full level label in the XP progress card expanded layout. {level} is the current level integer.
Total XP label in the XP progress card. {xp} is a formatted XP string like '12,400'.
Progress label showing percentage completion towards the next level. {percent} is 0-99; {level} is the next level integer.
Prestige indicator label shown for users who have reached max level. {level} is the prestige level integer.
Label for the daily goals row in the XP progress card goals preview.
Unit label next to the streak count in the XP progress card when there is an active streak.
Streak value shown in the XP progress card when the user has no current streak.
